info.title: Document Intelligence Platform API
info.description: Comprehensive REST API for document processing, OCR, workflow orchestration, model training, and human-in-the-loop review

message.description: Error message from the thrown Error object

componentStack.description: React component stack trace from ErrorInfo

errorStack.description: JavaScript error stack trace from the Error object

url.description: Browser URL where the error occurred (window.location.href)

received.description: Indicates the error was received successfully

groupId.description: The ID of the group this API key should be scoped to

id.description: The ID of the API key to operate on

expires_in.description: Seconds until the new access token expires

role.description: The authenticated user's role in this group

preferred_username.description: Keycloak preferred username or IDIR username

isAdmin.description: Whether the user has system-admin status in the database

expires_in.description: Seconds until the current access token expires

groups.description: Groups the user belongs to; all groups if the user is a system-admin

email.description: The email address of the user who made the request

resolvedAt.description: The date the request was resolved

joinedAt.description: The date the user joined the group

format.description: Format of the ground truth file (json, jsonl, csv, etc.)

groundTruth.description: Array of ground truth file references

metadata.description: Sample metadata (docType, pageCount, language, source, etc.)

total.description: Total number of samples in the dataset version

path.description: Path to the ground truth file in the repository

format.description: Format of the ground truth file

sampleSize.description: Number of samples to validate (validates all if omitted)

sampled.description: Whether a sample was used for validation

totalSamples.description: Total number of samples in the dataset

sampleIds.description: Array of sample IDs to include in this split

stratificationRules.description: Optional stratification rules for distributing samples

sampleIds.description: Array of sample IDs included in this split

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the split was created

splits.description: List of splits for the dataset version

sampleIds.description: Array of sample IDs included in this split

sampleCount.description: Number of samples in the split

approvedAt.description: Timestamp when the document was approved

reviewerId.description: ID of the reviewer who approved the document

fieldCount.description: Number of fields in the document

correctionCount.description: Number of corrections made during review

groupId.description: Group ID that owns this dataset

documentIds.description: Array of HITL document IDs to include

version.description: The initial version created for the dataset

skipped.description: Documents that could not be processed

skipped.description: Documents that could not be processed

workflowVersionId.description: ID of the workflow version (WorkflowVersion.id) to use for OCR processing

workflowConfigOverrides.description: Optional workflow config overrides keyed by exposed-parameter path (e.g. { 'ctx.modelId': 'prebuilt-layout' }).

groupId.description: Group ID that owns this project
Group ID that owns this project

definitionCount.description: Number of benchmark definitions in this project

runCount.description: Number of benchmark runs in this project

splitId.description: Split ID (optional — if omitted, the benchmark runs on all samples)

workflowConfigOverrides.description: Workflow config overrides — map of exposed param paths to values. E.g. {"ctx.modelId.defaultValue": "prebuilt-read"}

evaluatorType.description: Evaluator type (must match a registered evaluator)

sourceWorkflowId.description: Source workflow lineage ID for candidate workflows

value.description: Threshold value (absolute min or relative ratio)

metrics.description: Aggregated metrics from the baseline run

split.description: Split info (optional — definition may use full dataset)

workflowConfigHash.description: Workflow config hash (captured at creation time)

workflowConfigOverrides.description: Per-definition overrides for exposed workflow config parameters

immutable.description: Whether the definition is immutable (has runs)

baselineRun.description: Current baseline run for this definition (if any)

immutable.description: Whether the definition is immutable (has runs)

workflowConfigOverrides.description: Workflow config overrides — map of exposed param paths to values

evaluatorType.description: Evaluator type (must match a registered evaluator)

cron.description: Cron expression for the schedule (e.g., '0 2 * * *' for 2 AM daily)

candidateWorkflowVersionId.description: Workflow version ID of the candidate to promote into the base lineage

runId.description: Run ID that was promoted to baseline

definitionId.description: Definition ID this baseline belongs to

projectId.description: Project ID this baseline belongs to

normalizeFieldsEmptyValueCoercion.description: Force emptyValueCoercion on every ocr.normalizeFields node ("none" | "blank" | "null")

applied.description: Number of recommendations applied to the graph

pipelineMessage.description: Human-readable message when status is no_recommendations

rejectionDetails.description: One line per failed recommendation when graph apply rejected tools

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the step started

entries.description: Debug log entries from the last pipeline run

runtimeSettingsOverride.description: Optional runtime settings override (merged with definition runtime settings)

candidateWorkflowVersionId.description: When set, the run uses this workflow version's config (e.g. a candidate). Otherwise the definition's pinned workflow is used. Uses the same id format as `workflow_versions.id` (cuid).

persistOcrCache.description: When true, persist Azure OCR poll JSON per sample for replay. Default false when omitted.

ocrCacheBaselineRunId.description: Replay OCR from a prior completed baseline run (same definition). Replay runs do not persist cache.

status.description: Run status (pending, running, completed, failed, cancelled)

isBaseline.description: Whether this is the baseline run

baselineThresholds.description: Baseline thresholds (if this run is a baseline)

status.description: Run status (pending, running, completed, failed, cancelled)

hasRegression.description: Whether this run has a regression compared to baseline

regressedMetricCount.description: Number of regressed metrics compared against baseline

isBaseline.description: Whether this is the baseline run

definitionId.description: Definition ID that produced this run

sampleCount.description: Number of cached OCR samples available from this run

tp.description: True positives: flagged AND incorrect (errors caught)

fp.description: False positives: flagged AND correct (false alarms)

fn.description: False negatives: not flagged AND incorrect (missed errors)

tn.description: True negatives: not flagged AND correct

evaluatedCount.description: Number of evaluable instances (with confidence and ground truth)

errorCount.description: Number of incorrect instances among evaluated

suggestedCatch90.description: Smallest threshold whose recall ≥ 0.90, or null if unattainable

suggestedBestBalance.description: Threshold maximizing F1 (ties broken by smaller threshold)

suggestedMinimizeReview.description: Largest threshold whose false-positive rate ≤ 0.10, or null if unattainable

notReady.description: True if the run has no evaluation results yet

fields.description: Per-field analysis (excludes fields with zero evaluable instances)

excludedFields.description: Names of fields excluded due to missing confidence or ground truth data

sampleId.description: Sample ID where the error occurred

sampleMetadata.description: Sample metadata (e.g. document filename, type, page number)

expected.description: Expected (ground truth) value for this field

predicted.description: Predicted value produced by the model for this field

confidence.description: Confidence score assigned by the evaluator (0–1)

matched.description: Whether this instance was matched correctly

evaluatedCount.description: Total number of instances across all samples where this field was evaluated

errorCount.description: Number of incorrect instances among evaluated

averageConfidence.description: Average confidence score across all evaluated instances

averageConfidenceCorrect.description: Average confidence score for correctly matched instances only

averageConfidenceErrors.description: Average confidence score for error instances only

suggestedCatch90.description: Smallest threshold whose recall ≥ 0.90, or null if unattainable

suggestedBestBalance.description: Threshold maximizing F1 (ties broken by smaller threshold)

suggestedMinimizeReview.description: Largest threshold whose false-positive rate ≤ 0.10, or null if unattainable

errors.description: Every error instance for this field across all samples, with source document, expected/predicted values, and confidence score.

pass.description: Whether this sample passed the evaluator

groundTruth.description: Ground truth data (resolved from blob storage when needed)

prediction.description: Prediction/output data (resolved from blob storage when needed)

evaluationDetails.description: Field-by-field evaluation details: each entry includes field name, matched flag, confidence score, and any error information from the evaluator. Resolved from blob storage when the run was written under the blob-storage scheme.

evaluationBlobPath.description: Path to the per-sample evaluation details blob, included for traceability when downloads are inspected against the underlying object store.

blobReadError.description: Set when this sample's evaluation details could not be loaded from blob storage. The export is still returned so the rest of the run is usable.

exportedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this export was generated

exportFormatVersion.description: Export schema version. Incremented when the export shape changes.

run.description: Full run metadata including status, error, and baseline comparison

metrics.description: Complete metrics object as stored on the run, including any nested `_aggregate` data and the per-sample metric snapshots.

perFieldResults.description: Per-field results aggregated over all samples. Includes all metrics (evaluatedCount, errorCount, errorRate, suggested thresholds) but excludes the heavy confidence-threshold curve data.

perSampleResults.description: Every per-sample result with full evaluation details inlined. Includes ground truth, prediction, field-level matched/confidence, and any per-sample diagnostics or error info.

errorDetectionAnalysis.description: Precomputed error-detection analysis (suggested cut-offs per field, without curve data). Omitted for runs that have no per-sample results yet.

pass.description: Whether this sample passed the evaluator thresholds

evaluationDetails.description: Evaluation result details (field-by-field comparison for schema-aware evaluators)

total.description: Total number of results before pagination

dimensionValues.description: Available values for each filter dimension

runId.description: Run ID that was promoted to baseline

isBaseline.description: Whether this run is now the baseline

candidateWorkflowVersionId.description: Workflow version ID of the candidate to apply to the base lineage

cleanupCandidateArtifacts.description: Delete the candidate lineage, definitions pointing to it, and their runs

newBaseWorkflowVersionId.description: New workflow version ID on the base lineage

newVersionNumber.description: New version number on the base lineage

cleanedUp.description: Whether candidate artifacts were cleaned up

total.description: Total document count across all statuses

complete.description: Documents that completed entire process (OCR + optional HITL)

rejected_by_human.description: Documents rejected by a human reviewer

thumbnailData.description: Base64 WebP data URL, or null if no thumbnail is available

normalized_file_path.description: Blob key of the normalized PDF used for OCR and in-app viewing.

purged_at.description: Set once the ephemeral-cleanup janitor has purged the document's blobs (original and/or normalized PDF) per its workflow's retention policy. When set, the OCR result is retained but /view and /download return 410 Gone. Null = not purged.

total.description: Total number of documents matching the filter

content.description: Structured OCR output. Shape: { format: "text"|"markdown", text: string, markdown?: string, pages: [{ pageNumber, content, lines }] }. Populated for prebuilt read/layout/document models.

approved.description: Whether the document is approved (true) or rejected (false)

rejectionReason.description: Required when approved is false. Reason for rejecting the document.

id.description: Stable workflow lineage ID (identity in lists and URLs)

workflowVersionId.description: ID of the workflow version row whose config is shown (head or pinned snapshot)

slug.description: URL/CLI-friendly stable handle, unique within the group. Use this in upload requests (workflow_slug).

actorId.description: ID of the user who owns the workflow

groupId.description: ID of the group this workflow belongs to

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for the workflow config

version.description: Immutable revision number for this workflow version row (increments on new config)

workflowVersionId.description: Existing WorkflowVersion.id within this lineage to set as head

used.description: Neural builds used in the current quota window

quota.description: Quota cap of neural builds per window

quotaResetDateTime.description: ISO timestamp when the quota resets

region.description: Azure region of the Document Intelligence resource

customNeuralDocumentModelBuilds.description: Custom neural document model build quota / usage

valid.description: Whether the template model has sufficient labeled data for training

labeledDocumentsCount.description: Number of labeled documents in the template model

minimumRequired.description: Minimum number of labeled documents required

issues.description: List of validation issues preventing training

buildMode.description: Azure Document Intelligence build mode (default: template)

maxTrainingHours.description: Maximum training hours budget. Only used for neural builds; ignored when buildMode=template. Capped at 10 hours — Azure's free-tier ceiling. Requests above 10 require a configured Azure budget and are rejected here as a guardrail against unintended spend.

sasUrl.description: SAS URL for blob storage access

blobCount.description: Number of blobs uploaded for training

buildMode.description: Azure build mode used for this job

trainingJobId.description: Training job that produced this model

version.description: Sequential version number within the template (1-based)

isActive.description: Whether this version is currently the active one

deletedAt.description: When this version was tombstoned, if applicable

fieldCount.description: Number of fields the model recognizes

buildMode.description: Azure build mode used to train this version

actualTrainingHours.description: Actual training time consumed by Azure (neural only)

labels.description: Labels as they were at training time

labelingDocumentId.description: Labeling document ID to add to template model

polygon.description: Polygon points as array of numbers [x1,y1,x2,y2,...]

span.description: Span information from OCR for ordering

field_key.description: Field key this label belongs to

replaceAll.description: Whether to replace all existing labels

element_ids.description: Element IDs to assign in UI

benchmarkRunIds.description: Benchmark run IDs to include mismatch data from

canonicalize.description: Canonicalize operation(s). Available: digits, uppercase, lowercase, strip-spaces, text, number, date:FORMAT, noop. Chainable with |.

pattern.description: Regex pattern the canonicalized value must match

displayTemplate.description: Display template using # as digit placeholder

fieldKey.description: The field key this suggestion applies to

rationale.example: All 22 corrections strip spaces/dashes from 9-digit values

sampleCount.description: Number of corrections analyzed for this field

fields.description: Extracted key-value pairs with confidence scores

total.description: Total number of documents matching the filter

totalDocuments.description: Total documents in the review queue

averageConfidence.description: Average confidence score across all documents

fieldDefinitions.description: Field format definitions from the template model for client-side validation

expiresAt.description: New expiry time for the lock

templateModelIds.description: Filter corrections by template model IDs

benchmarkRunIds.description: Include mismatch pairs from these benchmark run IDs

sources.description: Data sources to derive the matrix from

model_id.description: Azure model id to run against. If omitted, the workflow's ctx.modelId.defaultValue is used.

group_id.description: Target group. Optional when authenticating with an API key (inferred from the key's group).

workflow_slug.description: Stable workflow handle, unique within the group. Resolves to the head version unless workflow_version is set.

workflow_version.description: Pin to a specific workflow_version of the slug. Ignored without workflow_slug.

workflow_config_id.description: Accepts a WorkflowVersion.id or a WorkflowLineage.id (resolved to head). Mutually exclusive with workflow_slug.

ctx_overrides.description: Per-upload overrides for the workflow's ctx defaults. Keys are ctx field names from the workflow config (e.g. outputFormat, confidenceThreshold). Values shallowly override the workflow's ctx.<key>.defaultValue at start time.

needed.description: Whether system bootstrap is still needed (no system admins exist)

eligible.description: Whether the current caller is eligible to perform bootstrap

groupId.description: ID of the created Default group

groupName.description: Name of the created Default group

group_id.description: Group ID this table belongs to

seed_value.description: Any JSON-compatible value written to all existing rows that are missing a value for this column. Type-validated against the column schema in the service layer (not at the HTTP boundary). Only applied during this operation — not used when new rows are inserted.

data.description: Row data shaped per column definitions
